geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation ward map 2022, GCC boundary shapefiles

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Chennai district tables, estimated population growth at 0.7% CAGR for 2024 projection

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu urban tables, PLFS 2022-23 quarterly bulletin, estimated for central Chennai commercial zone

commute_profile.data_source: CMRL ridership reports 2023, Chennai suburban railway usage data from Southern Railway, CMP Chennai 2018 mode share survey

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Tamil Nadu state survey, Southern Railway passenger feedback reports, transit hub high-diffusion characteristic

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from transit hub social mixing patterns, higher cross-income bridging due to commercial zone diversity

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Moore Market area historical footfall, GCC commercial zone survey 2022
Chennai Central station daily passenger count from Southern Railway, estimated vendor cluster from station area surveys
Rajiv Gandhi Government General Hospital annual report, estimated from OPD footfall data

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted Transit Hub/Mixed template for Chennai Central's government office and hospital presence, increased government_employee weight

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GCC ward councillor count, Southern Railway institutional presence, hospital leadership
